creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160792
patch fixing aws4 issues

There are a number of issues with the current released Net-Amazon-Signature-V4 module. I submitted a patch on rt ~9months ago but unfortunately haven't heard back.

Now we have a port for this I wanted to get this in so the module its usable until 0.15 of Net-Amazon-Signature-V4 is release with the fixes.

See attached patch.
